name: Selvedge Relaxed Jeans
description: Genuine selvedge construction at a fraction of premium denim pricing. 13.5oz cotton will fade and develop character over years of wear.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: The price allows me to own multiple pairs guilt-free. Real indigo means authentic fading. The weight means structure that lasts. At ₹3990, I'm being smart about money without sacrificing quality.
whatItReplaces: Replaced a pair of raw designer denim I owned for two years and wore maybe thirty times total — the price never stopped mattering enough to wear them carelessly, which defeats the point of raw denim.
whyIChooseThis: Over luxury denim brands: This fabric ages as beautifully for a fraction of the cost. Over thinner uniqlo denim: This weight is future-proof. Over trendy denim: I'm not buying a fashion statement.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Every casual outfit foundation. Under Massimo Dutti overshirts, Supima tees, Massimo Dutti coat. With Samba or white Achilles. This is my weekend denim.
layeringCombinations: Not a layering piece — it's a foundation. Works under the overshirt or the Harrington on top.
colourCombinations: Indigo and black cover both ends of the wardrobe — indigo for daytime and casual, black for anything that needs to read slightly more considered.
bestOccasions: Weekend, casual weekday, anything that doesn't require trousers
costPerWearReasoning: ₹3,990 for a pair worn at least once a week. Even replacing them every two years, that's under ₹40 a wear, and the fade only gets better with time.
whatMakesItTimeless: Real indigo, selvedge construction, neutral indigo color. No special details to date. In 20 years, well-worn jeans will look vintage-quality.
whatProblemItSolves: Needing jeans that get better with time, not worse. Authentic indigo fading is the point—my pair becomes mine through wear.
whatCouldReplaceIt: A heavier Japanese selvedge import for more premium materials. A.P.C. for French approach. But this selvedge at this price is specific.
similarPiecesIWouldProbablyLike: Uniqlo Supima tee (same value intelligence). Samba OG (same proportional confidence). Cartier Santos (same 'buy once' philosophy).
alternativeUnder3000: Uniqlo Slim Straight Jeans non-selvedge (~₹2,490 at uniqlo.com/in) — same fit, lighter denim
alternativeUnder10000: Zara Slim Fit Jeans (~₹3,990 at zara.com/in) — trendier cut, less durable
premiumAlternative: A.P.C. Petit New Standard (~₹22,000 import via apc.fr) — French raw denim benchmark
buyRecommendation: Buy Now — selvedge construction at this price is genuinely hard to match. No meaningful sales; buy in both indigo and black.
